args.query:
SELECT "Order".Id as OrderId, "Order".EffectiveDate, "Order".Status, OrderItem.Id as OrderItemId, OrderItem.Product2Id, OrderItem.Quantity, Product2.Name as ProductName, Product2.Description 
FROM "Order" 
JOIN OrderItem ON "Order".Id = OrderItem.OrderId 
JOIN Product2 ON OrderItem.Product2Id = Product2.Id 
WHERE "Order".AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' 
AND "Order".EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' 
AND "Order".EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01' 
AND (Product2.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR Product2.Name LIKE '%processing%' OR Product2.Name LIKE '%unit%')
